hero.title: Partnerships for Hotels and Enterprises

card1.title: Dedicated Fleet
card1.text: Access exclusive vehicles and priority booking for your clients.

card2.title: Seamless Integration
card2.text: Easy booking flows and API/portal options for hotel desks and corporate travel teams.

card3.title: Tailored Pricing
card3.text: Competitive rates and packages adapted to your needs.

package1.title: Silver
package1.text: Basic priority booking and monthly billing

package2.title: Gold
package2.text: Dedicated account manager and volume discounts

package3.title: Platinum
package3.text: Full concierge integration and bespoke SLAs
